sentences.arabic: أَصَابَ رِيحٌ بَارِدَةٌ سَارَةَ وَبَدَأَتْ تَعْطِسُ كَثِيرًا.
sentences.translation: Sara je uhvatila hladni vjetar i počela puno kihati.
sentences.translationEn: Sara caught a cold wind and started sneezing a lot.

sentences.arabic: بَقِيَتْ فِي الْبَيْتِ وَغَطَّتْ نَفْسَهَا بِبِطَّانِيَّةٍ دَافِئَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Ostala je kod kuće i pokrila se toplim ćebetom.
sentences.translationEn: She stayed at home and covered herself with a warm blanket.

sentences.arabic: شَرِبَتْ شَايًا سَاخِنًا وَأَكَلَتْ حَسَاءً دَافِئًا.
sentences.translation: Popila je vruć čaj i pojela toplu supu.
sentences.translationEn: She drank hot tea and ate warm soup.

sentences.arabic: فِي الْيَوْمِ التَّالِي شَعَرَتْ بِتَحَسُّنٍ وَعَادَتِ الْبَسْمَةُ إِلَى وَجْهِهَا.
sentences.translation: Sljedećeg dana se osjetila bolje i osmijeh se vratio na njezino lice.
sentences.translationEn: The next day she felt better and the smile returned to her face.
